# Turboksi — PT Turbo Kontrol Solusi

> Engineering and technology solutions company specializing in rotating equipment,
> condition monitoring, root cause analysis, and industrial training across Indonesia.

- Company: PT Turbo Kontrol Solusi (Turboksi)
- Website: https://turboksi.com
- Email: info@turboksi.com
- Founded: 2023
- NIB: 0707230279356
- SK Kemenkumham: AHU-0048596.AH.01.01.TAHUN 2023
- Location: Jl. KH Abdullah Syafei, Tebet Timur, South Jakarta 12820, Indonesia

## Services

Rotating Equipment Design & Selection, Condition Monitoring & Predictive Maintenance,
Root Cause Failure Analysis (RCFA), Training & Consultancy, Maintenance Strategy Development,
PLC Programming & Automation, AI-Powered Analytics, Reliability Centered Maintenance (RCM),
Project Management & Technical Advisory.

## Products

- RCA Tool: https://rcatool.site — Structured digital platform for industrial Root Cause Analysis.
  Features: evidence collection, Fishbone diagrams, 5-Why analysis, corrective action planning,
  automatic PDF report generation. Free and Pro plans. Used by 80+ users in Indonesia.
- RCM Tool: Coming soon — Reliability Centered Maintenance platform for defining optimal
  maintenance strategies for critical industrial assets.

## Clients

Pertamina, PLN, Geodipa, Vale, Pupuk Iskandar Muda

## Industries Served

Oil & Gas, Power Generation, Geothermal, Mining, Manufacturing
